Event

Meet BPD and Revive at HMPS 2024

April 17 - 19
Las Vegas, NV

The 29th Healthcare Marketing & Physician Strategies Summit (HMPS24) will take place April 17-19, 2024, at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas, NV. The Revive and BPD teams are excited to attend, and even more excited to host several events. Join us for our exclusive night out, stop by our booth, register for our pre-conference workshop session and don’t miss our panel session with other industry thought leaders.

RSVP to the afterparty

Working in healthcare is more stressful than ever before, and you deserve some time to connect and socialize with peers who face similar daily challenges. Join BPD and Revive for an exclusive event on the first night of HMPS – Wednesday, April 17th starting at 7:00 pm. We’ve rented out Flight Club, a social dart bar with craft cocktails and elevated eats. Located in Grand Canal Shoppes at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas Check out the venue here. You can expect plenty of food and drinks, along with great conversation and entertainment.

Add your name to the list. Space is limited.

 

Stop by Booth 52

The Revive and BPD team will have a booth on the exhibit floor during the conference at booth 52. Stop by to chat with our team about your marketing challenges, gain insights into recent industry trends, or just say hello. If you’d like to set up a designated time to chat with a team member, please reach out to partner@reviveagency.com.

Patient Acquisition Marketing:
Overcoming the Roadblocks

Pre-Conference Workshop Session

Healthcare executives understand the importance of patient acquisition, or data-driven, marketing. But doing it right is difficult. This hands-on workshop will dig down deep into the challenges as well as practical solutions for overcoming them. Learn how to gain access to the data you need even when IT says no, effectively segment your audiences, and build an ROI model your C­-Suite can get behind.

Add Session to Calendar

A Wake-Up Call: The Future of the CMO

Pre-Conference Workshop Session

Healthcare executives understand the importance of patient acquisition, or data-driven, marketing. But doing it right is difficult. This hands-on workshop will dig down deep into the challenges as well as practical solutions for overcoming them. Learn how to gain access to the data you need even when IT says no, effectively segment your audiences, and build an ROI model your C­-Suite can get behind.

Add Session to Calendar
